name: Olivia Dance
city: I am located in Spanish Fork Utah
loc_drive: I am located in Spanish Fork Utah, 45mi
ai_summary: Olivia Dance is a 22-year-old from Spanish Fork, Utah with babysitting experience for newborns to 8-year-olds. She is available full-time and emphasizes understanding children's behavior and promoting positive development.

transcripts.q3:
My name is Olivia dance. I am 22 years old. I have worked with pretty much all ages from newborns to about 8, years old. I have no official training. It's just been babysitting and childcare classes. And I like working with kids, because
 They are our future and so I want to shape them so that they can make our future better.
transcripts.q4: I am located in Spanish Fork Utah. And I am willing to drive a half hour to 45 minutes to wherever I'm needed.
transcripts.q5: I am looking for full-time and I am available whenever
transcripts.q6: I always try to separate them and then talk to both of them and try and understand the situation and what happened. And just make them understand what was wrong about the situation.
transcripts.q7: I love working with children and watching them grow and develop. I have a good understanding of how children function and why they do the things they do. And I believe this job will help me in my future career as an emergency medical technician.
